translated: Now, let's read a message for the Lunchtime Request. This one is from Liella name: Mizuki.
Alright!

Thank you. They say, "I'm requesting Sky Linker. My favorite part of the song is the 'Right now, I'll change it right now' line before the final chorus. Mei-chan usually speaks in a low voice, but her high notes here are so clear. I love the gap and how her voice sounds like a cry from the soul."
Thank you so much.
That was the message.
Thanks a lot!
You can really feel the soul in it.
It's a very passionate song, so please listen closely not just to the vocals, but to the backing track as well.
Now, please listen.
Yoneme Mei, "Sky Linker."
The reason I only notice the broken pieces
is because I know what perfection looks like.
And that's okay.
I'm far from a god who can end someone's hesitation,
but I'll get soaked in the rain with you until we find it.
My wish is in the blue sky, I'll take the hand that wants it.
Everything, yes, I'll block out everything that's in our way.
I'll even protect you from fate itself.
Always,
yes, always, don't lose to this depressing world today.
Rise up
and fly over countless obstacles to reach our destination.
We've become what you call "comrades."
When I pray for someone other than myself, I'll prove there's not a single cloud of doubt.
Dive into the blue sky, if you hold this hand, I'll do it.
Everything,
yes, everything—what's wrong with being weak?
If you want to cry, then cry and scream, I don't mind.
Always,
yes, always, I'll accept any version of you.
Show me who you are.
Even if you're cracked, I'll show you I can take it all without breaking.
If you want a tough vessel, if you want a clear present, I'll change it right now.
In that blue sky,
if you look up, I'll take you to that brilliant blue.
Everything,
yes, everything, I'll block out the noise.
I'll even protect you from fate itself.
I'll support you, you have a place here.
Don't you ever lose.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuu-Yuu-Friendship Lunchtime Broadcast Station, Liella!
Radio.
